headline: Will Keytruda Continue to Aid MRK's Growth in 2026 After a Strong Q1?
summary: Keytruda aids Merck's Q1 performance with $8B in sales. New indications plus combo therapies could fuel the drug's overall growth through 2026.

headline: Can Pfizer Achieve High Single-Digit Revenue CAGR From 2029?

headline: Dr. Reddy's Q4 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates, Stock Down
summary: RDY stock down 5% on missing fiscal fourth-quarter 2026 earnings and revenue estimates as North America generics sales slumped.

headline: Bristol-Myers Strikes $15.2 Billion China Drug Deal

headline: Mann Partners Appoints Industry Veteran David Cohen to Advisory Board
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., May 13, 2026--Mann Partners announced the appointment of PE veteran David Cohen, Managing Director at Kelso & Company, to its Advisory Board.
